input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.3.1
            TITLE: maximum time

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.3.1: Maximum Time
D.13.3.1 Maximum Time 
Vehicles whose average Endurance laptime exceeds 1.45 times the average Endurance 
laptime of the fastest team that completes the Endurance event will receive zero points

final_answer: rule D.13.3.1: Maximum Time D.13.3.1 Maximum Time Vehicles whose average Endurance laptime exceeds 1.45 times the average Endurance laptime of the fastest team that completes the Endurance event will receive zero points
